lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did Jesus say all the disciples would do?
answers: Die on a cross like him

questions.text: What did Jesus say Peter would do?
answers: Deny knowing Him three times before the rooster crowed
Run away faster than everyone else

questions.text: What did Peter and the other disciples say they were willing to do?
answers: Stay with Jesus, even if it meant dying

questions.text: What did Peter do when they tried to arrest Jesus?
answers: Peter cut off a servant's ear, and Jesus healed it
Peter cut off a servant's nose

questions.text: Why did Jesus allow Himself to be arrested?
answers: So the Scriptures would come true and He could complete His mission

questions.text: After Jesus said He was the Messiah, what punishment did the leaders say He deserved?
What did the leaders do to Jesus after the trial?
answers: They beat Him and spit on Him
They threw him in a pit

questions.text: Where was Peter while Jesus was on trial?
answers: Outside in the courtyard by the fire

questions.text: When three different people asked Peter if he was with Jesus, what did Peter say?
What happened after Peter said he didn't know Jesus three times?
